title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
